name: Emo-FilM — Emotion in Naturalistic Films fMRI
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds004892) of 30 participants watching emotionally rich films during fMRI, with continuous emotion annotations. A resource for modeling the dynamics of affective experience during naturalistic viewing.
citation: Morgenroth E, et al. (2025). Emo-FilM: a dataset of emotion annotations and fMRI during naturalistic film watching. Scientific Data, 12, 489.
